horoscope: The Moon moves into your sign today for a stay of a couple of days, dear Aries, and your emotions are on your sleeve. Today, you may have additional obligations to attend to, and you’re a self-starter. There can be a strong focus on analyzing a past or unfinished matter. You may want to do something tangible or symbolic to let go of negative emotional energy. Think in terms of detoxing and decluttering, as you have excellent energy with you to do so. You might also find it enjoyable to work in some level of solitude now. You see a reason to put a positive spin on an issue now, and it comes as a relief.

The Moon moves into the sign behind yours, dear Taurus, where it will stay for a couple of days. You need some extra time to yourself or simply away from the grind and routine. Aim to get rid of extra mental clutter for the best results now. The Moon meets with Saturn today, reminding you of what’s unfinished or a current challenge. Focusing on others can be rewarding, particularly if you are helping out. This is a great time for making friends and connections, even with the potential for minor misunderstandings. You can be particularly motivated to resolve an old problem, particularly friendship- or people-related. You might also be interested in reviving an old idea and bringing it back to life in a new way. You may be finding more value in the connections you make, yet you're also building your inner stores, looking for meaning in life from deep within yourself.

Something might happen that makes a long-term goal seem more realizable today, dear Gemini. You may have a strong need to be productive, though your focus is more on happiness goals than on practical pursuits. The Moon moves into your social sector for a couple of days, and the key to emotional fulfillment right now may be to focus on your special wishes and dreams. Someone is more reliable than usual, having their priorities straight. You could be reworking old ideas, projects, or plans with great success. You're willing to put in the time to reach your goals, although it's not the most patient of days. In fact, with Mercury ending its retrograde tomorrow, the shift happening now can be confusing, so major decision-making should wait.

You can feel more directed and purposeful than usual today, dear Cancer, although on this day before Mercury ends its retrograde, it's best to wait and see for new beginnings. Still, your responsibilities and performance are high on your list of interests, and you can feel a strong need to manage a situation or put more energy into your practical priorities. Resourcefulness helps you greatly. While words exchanged are imperfect, you can enjoy some exciting ideas to break out of the usual routine. Watch for a tendency to speak before thinking, but aim to enjoy the high energy for your ideas and interests.

You might enjoy some serious learning, studying, sharing, or thinking today, dear Leo, with the Moon conjunct Saturn and the Sun parallel to Saturn. Saturn is currently transiting your sector of spirit, the higher mind, and sharing ideas. Today, you want engaging experiences and a break from the routine or a change of scenery, but you also want to be productive. You can feel quite ambitious to improve your situation. While there could be a difference in opinion that sticks with you and frustrates you, you're also in good shape for thinking outside the box. You’re looking forward to special pursuits, experiences, commitments, and attachments.

The Moon heads into your intimacy sector today, dear Virgo, for a stay of a couple of days. You’re inclined to take things a little more seriously than usual with this transit, and this can be particularly the case today with the Moon’s meet-up with Saturn and the Sun parallel to Saturn. These are powerful influences for getting to the bottom of a problem, researching or investigating, or pouring your energy into an absorbing project or activity. Dealing with a block or responsibility can lead to some important improvements. It’s a good time to piece things together one at a time and attend to various details. Complications are possible, but you may not feel you have the emotional bandwidth to handle them. Conversations can be exciting or animated as the day advances. Your relationships can feel competitive now, but they can also be motivating.

The day brings a stronger focus on balancing your life in key ways, dear Libra, and you can be quite focused on your relationships. Fulfilling your responsibilities to someone special can be a theme. What you learn can be reinvested in your relationships, strengthening them. It’s also a good day to apply yourself, especially to pursuits that fulfill you socially and emotionally. Striving for balance and more patience can be rewarding. Your interactions with a significant other can be instructional in some manner, whether it’s a direct or indirect thing. As the day progresses, watch for impatience with details, as working with them can be to your advantage. This is a powerful time to fix problems so that your life runs more smoothly.

With just a little focus, you can get a lot done today, dear Scorpio. You’re in the right frame of mind for attention to detail, and you can feel quite compelled to take care of business. You’re not in the mood to beat around the bush, and you seem to have an emotional need to get on top of your routine or daily affairs. Still, you’re not content with the monotony of the routine, and it can be a good idea to do new things or combine play and work to keep you engaged. In fact, you may want to renew or refresh a hobby or pastime. Enthusiasm runs high to produce and move things forward, but consider that on this day before Mercury's direct turn, not everything is as it seems. Give things a little more time to unblock.

Security and stability are prioritized goals right now, dear Sagittarius, while you're also seeking natural, easy self-expression. The Moon heads into your creativity sector for a stay of a couple of days--an area of your solar chart that rules recreation, leisure, and the pursuit of pleasure and joy. Still, with Saturn in this sector, your idea of relaxation can be someone’s idea of work! Being more structured with your downtime can be beneficial for you at this time. Spending time doing productive things can be appealing, even soothing. You can take particular pleasure in coming up with strategies, plans, and workable solutions to problems. Still, on this day before the end of Mercury's retrograde, some things are still up in the air.

This is a day for special attention to home and family, your support system, and personal matters, dear Capricorn. It can also be a time of interesting studies or gathering important intel. You can be focused on the practical or functional side of your domestic world or personal life today. As you straighten out your home environment, you may experience improved inner clarity. Dialing things back a little makes sense now, but you’re likely to want to be productive. There is some tendency for misunderstandings or mental limbo on this day before Mercury ends its retrograde, but these things can help you see flaws where you missed them previously. You have more mental energy than usual.

This can be a good day for making the best use of your talents and resources, dear Aquarius, but it's a powerful time for sorting out your thoughts. The Moon heads into your solar sector of communication for a stay of a couple of days, meeting Saturn there, and obligations are on your mind. A bit of self-discipline can go a long way, as events of the day might awaken a need to get going on something for which you’ve been procrastinating. You can be ready to do what it takes to solve problems and jump hurdles, if need be, to achieve your goals. However, on this day before Mercury ends its retrograde, there are a few details missing, and you may need to wait and see before you can reach conclusions.

Applying yourself to your most important priorities comes naturally today, dear Pisces. You may do your best work today at your own pace or independently, as others may only slow you down at the moment. You can have a strong desire to get your practical affairs in order today, although some details may be missing on this day before Mercury ends its retrograde. The Moon heads into your sector of resources and security for a couple of days, and paying special attention to detail or your money and personal possessions can be in focus. You’re in a strong position to take stock of what you have and what you might need. You're in better shape today if you think ahead rather than worry about immediate gratification.
